containerOverrides.name: web
command: const{PrismaClient}=require('@prisma/client');const p=new PrismaClient();p.$queryRawUnsafe("SELECT tablename FROM pg_tables WHERE schemaname='public'").then(r=>{console.log(JSON.stringify(r,null,2));process.exit(0)}).catch(e=>{console.error(String(e));process.exit(1)})
